title: InstallSkillMethod
description: Contract for install.skill JSON-RPC method. Installs one or more skills from the Skill Host Folder into a project; runs asynchronously and reports progress via operation.progress notifications.

projectId.description: ID of the project to install skills into

InstallSkillResponse.title: InstallSkillResponse
InstallSkillResponse.description: Immediate response — the installation runs asynchronously. Errors: validation_error (1001) projectId or skillIds not found; conflict_error (1005) project already has an active operation.

operationId.description: ID of the created install operation; use with operation.progress notifications and operation.cancel
